name: Wyvern Nafir
description:
This simple trumpet is carved from a single wyvern horn. A wyvern nafir grants you a +2 item bonus to Performance checks while playing music with the instrument.

Activate—Wyvern Scream 2 (auditory, concentrate, manipulate, sonic)

Frequency once per day

Effect You blast a draconic scream from the nafir. All creatures in a take |options:area-damage] damage ( save). On a failed save, the target is pushed back 5 feet (or 10 feet on a critical failure).
